text: Here's what science actually says about thyroid hormones. Thyroid hormones regulate metabolism, energy, and even mood. But what happens if these hormones are out of balance? Research shows low levels can lead to fatigue and depression. But here’s the twist: too much can cause anxiety and weight loss! Understanding your thyroid can change your health journey dramatically. Want to learn more about your health? Follow for insights!
